description: Brazilian criminal organization founded in 2007 in the Pedrinhas Penitentiary Complex in São Luís, Maranhão. It operates in the states of Maranhão, Piauí, and Mato Grosso, engaging in drug trafficking, murders, robberies, and prison rebellions. Originally allied with Primeiro Comando da Capital, it later broke with them and is now a major gang in northeastern Brazil.
